scripts.setup: nub --cwd app install && nub --cwd app/src-svelte install && nub --cwd site install && nub --cwd api install
scripts.check: nub --cwd app/src-svelte run check && nub --cwd site run check && nub --cwd api run typecheck
scripts.lint: nub --cwd app/src-svelte run lint && nub --cwd site run lint && nub --cwd api run lint
scripts.format: nub --cwd app/src-svelte run format && nub --cwd site run format && nub --cwd api run format
scripts.format:check: nub --cwd app/src-svelte run format:check && nub --cwd site run format:check && nub --cwd api run format:check
scripts.test: nub --cwd app/src-svelte run test && nub --cwd site run test
scripts.eval:corpus:test: nub --node --test app/scripts/eval/corpus.test.ts app/scripts/eval/corpus-intake.test.ts app/scripts/eval/corpus-prepare.test.ts app/scripts/eval/corpus-result.test.ts app/scripts/eval/corpus-withdraw.test.ts app/scripts/eval/corpus-benchmark-lock.test.ts app/scripts/eval/corpus-benchmark-checkpoints.test.ts app/scripts/eval/corpus-benchmark-options.test.ts app/scripts/eval/corpus-benchmark-plan.test.ts app/scripts/eval/corpus-benchmark-run.test.ts app/scripts/eval/evaluator-revision.test.ts
